title: Feature Design Schema
description: A schema for defining the detailed design and behavior of a specific software feature.

$schema.description: URL to the JSON schema for validation.

featureId.description: A unique identifier for the feature (e.g., FEAT-001).

description.description: A high-level overview of the feature and its purpose.

relatedRequirements.description: A list of requirement IDs that this feature addresses.

affectedComponents.description: この機能の実装に関わるコンポーネントIDのリスト。

relatedScreens.description: この機能に関連する画面IDのリスト。

behavioralLogic.description: Detailed description of the feature's behavior.

preconditions.description: Conditions that must be true before the feature's logic is executed.

steps.description: A sequence of steps describing the interaction between the user and the system, or between system components.

postconditions.description: Conditions that must be true after the feature's logic is successfully executed.

sequenceDiagramMermaid.description: A Mermaid sequence diagram visualizing the interactions between components for this feature.

errorHandling.description: How different error scenarios are handled.

aiHint.description: AIがこの機能を実装する際の具体的な指示やヒント。例: 'エラー処理では適切なHTTPステータスコードを返してください'。
